fixtures.title: Clinician triage invocation with trusted current publication

observed.visibleText: Suggested support is visible in the staff workspace with source chips and a non-authoritative draft preview.

fixtures.title: Reduced-motion communications draft insertion remains human-settled

observed.visibleText: Draft inserted as suggested support until the clinician edits or accepts it.

fixtures.title: Admin release surface can inspect assurance output without insertion

observed.visibleText: Release assurance summary is read-only and contains only governed evidence.

fixtures.title: Support replay gets partial disclosure only

observed.visibleText: Support replay shows masked case context with privileged rationale withheld.

fixtures.title: Governance frozen rollout is read-only with release recovery

observed.visibleText: Frozen rollout is read-only. Release recovery is available for governance.

fixtures.title: Unauthorised user cannot invoke more-info assistive support

observed.visibleText: Assistive support is unavailable for this role.

fixtures.title: Patient-facing page denies raw assistive rationale

observed.visibleText: Only clinician-settled patient copy can appear here.

fixtures.title: Stale booking publication blocks current controls

observed.visibleText: Booking assistive output is frozen because the runtime publication is stale.

fixtures.title: Artifact quarantine blocks pharmacy artifact preview and download

observed.visibleText: Artifact preview is blocked by quarantine and download remains disabled.

fixtures.title: Global model vendor kill switch freezes open waitlist output

observed.visibleText: Global kill switch froze the open waitlist output without requiring refresh.

fixtures.title: Tenant kill switch blocks unopened more-info invocation

observed.visibleText: Tenant kill switch disables more-info assistive controls.

fixtures.title: Route-family booking kill switch freezes an open output

observed.visibleText: Booking route-family kill switch froze the open output and removed commit paths.

fixtures.title: Shadow cohort slice suppresses visible communications invocation

observed.visibleText: Shadow cohort slice records evidence without showing assistive controls.

fixtures.title: Runtime publication rollback with missing bundle fails closed

observed.visibleText: Runtime rollback blocks assistive output until release recovery settles the publication.

fixtures.title: Hard-blocked disabled pharmacy route with mismatch publication

observed.visibleText: Pharmacy assistive route is hard blocked and cannot mutate pharmacy outcome.

fixtures.title: Workspace session stale freeze disables insertion and shows regenerate

observed.visibleText: Session became stale. Open output is frozen and regenerate-in-place is the only recovery path.

fixtures.title: Patient surface receives only human-settled transformed content

observed.visibleText: A clinician-settled patient summary is available. No raw assistive rationale is exposed.
